posts.author: lohiyaakshay08
posts.community: Sheela Foam - An exciting branded play
posts.text: image 745×279 18.5 KB Decent quarter - QoQ flattish revenue, but gross margins have improved due to price hike in Q4. Net profit has shot up as the company has moved from WDV to the straight-line depreciation method and increased the asset’s useful life, thereby reducing depreciation charges. Further, it is high due to the gain on sale of the asset. But overall, on the right track, but need to monitor how the company is dealing with increased raw material costs due to the West Asia crises P.S - Wakefit & Duroflex also use the SLM for depreciation, but they have a useful life of 10-15 years vs…
